name: Savory Breaded Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, beat the egg and mix with 2 tablespoons water.
2. Place breadcrumbs in a separate paper bag.
3. Dip each pork chop into the egg mixture, allowing excess to drip off.
4. Shake off any remaining breadcrumbs in the paper bag.
5. Place coated chops onto a sheet of waxed paper.
6. Chill for 60 minutes to set the coating.
7. In a skillet over moderate heat, melt clarified butter and sage leaves.
8. Add pork chops and brown on both sides.
9. Transfer chops to a baking dish.
10. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 minutes. Serve hot.
